_comment: Copy to refresh_config.json and fill in. Tokens do NOT go here -- env vars / macOS keychain / GitHub Actions secrets (see refresh.py header). Pull scope: EITHER asana_portfolio_gid, OR asana_workspace_gid + asana_team_gid (team mode re-discovers the team's project list live each run, so new projects are found automatically). Canvas section is optional -- without a CANVAS_TOKEN the publish step is skipped and the report tells you when to re-upload the bundle manually.
